scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:api && bun run build:web
scripts.check:quality: bun run db:prepare && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run mutation
scripts.test: bun --filter @care-desk/shared test && bun --filter @care-desk/api test && bun --filter @care-desk/web test
scripts.typecheck: bun run db:generate && bun --filter @care-desk/shared typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/api typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/web typecheck
scripts.mutation: bun run mutation:web && bun run mutation:api:controller && bun run mutation:api:dto && bun run mutation:api:module-di && bun run mutation:api:repository && bun run mutation:api:service && bun run mutation:api:validation && bun run mutation:api
scripts.mutation:dry-run: bun run mutation:web:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:controller:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:dto:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:module-di:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:repository:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:service:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:validation:dry-run && bun run mutation:api:dry-run
scripts.mutation:api: bun run db:prepare && stryker run stryker.api.config.mjs
scripts.mutation:api:dry-run: bun run db:prepare && stryker run stryker.api.config.mjs --dryRunOnly
scripts.db:prepare: bun run db:compose:up && bun run db:migrate:deploy
